name: Hydrating Facial Cleanser
description: Gentle hydrating cleanser that restores the skin barrier. Ideal for dry and sensitive skin that feels tight after washing.

name: Foaming Facial Cleanser
description: Foaming cleanser that removes excess oil and impurities without disrupting the skin barrier. Great for oily and acne-prone skin.

name: Salicylic Acid 2% Solution
description: BHA exfoliant that penetrates pores to clear blackheads, whiteheads, and reduce breakouts. Ideal for congested oily skin.

name: Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
description: High-strength vitamin B3 serum that reduces sebum, minimizes pores, and fades post-acne marks. A bestseller for oily skin.

name: Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5
description: Multi-depth hydration serum that plumps skin and reduces fine lines caused by dehydration. Suitable for all skin types.

name: Retinol 0.5% in Squalane
description: Moderate-strength retinol in a hydrating squalane base to reduce fine lines, smooth texture, and fade dark spots overnight.

name: Alpha Arbutin 2% + HA
description: Brightening serum that targets dark spots, post-acne marks, and uneven skin tone with alpha arbutin and hydrating HA.

name: Effaclar Duo Acne Treatment
description: Dual-action acne treatment that clears breakouts and visibly reduces post-acne marks within 2 weeks.

name: Toleriane Double Repair Face Moisturizer
description: Restores the skin barrier and provides 48-hour hydration. Fragrance-free and safe for sensitive skin prone to redness.

name: Cicaplast Baume B5
description: Multi-purpose soothing balm that calms redness, repairs irritated skin, and relieves chapping and tightness.

name: Moisture Surge 100H Auto-Replenishing Hydrator
description: Oil-free gel moisturizer that provides 100 hours of hydration. Instantly plumps and refreshes dehydrated skin.

name: Even Better Clinical Radical Dark Spot Corrector
description: Clinically proven to reduce the look of dark spots and discolouration in 4-6 weeks. Suitable for all skin tones.

name: Vitamin C Suspension 23% + HA Spheres 2%
description: High-strength vitamin C treatment for visible brightening, dark spot reduction, and improved skin radiance.

name: Daily Moisturizing Lotion
description: Lightweight daily lotion with ceramides and hyaluronic acid for all-day moisture. Fragrance-free and non-comedogenic.

name: PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
description: Lightweight night moisturizer with niacinamide to refine pores and ceramides to restore the skin barrier overnight.

name: AHA 30% + BHA 2% Peeling Solution
description: 10-minute exfoliating mask with AHAs and BHA to resurface dull skin, clear pores, and fade dark spots. Use once a week.

name: Gentle Skin Cleanser
description: Ultra-gentle, soap-free cleanser that removes dirt without irritating sensitive or dry skin. Dermatologist recommended.

name: Moisturizing Cream
description: Rich, non-greasy cream that provides immediate and long-lasting relief from dry, sensitive skin. Fragrance-free.

name: Rapid Wrinkle Repair Retinol Serum
description: Fast-acting retinol serum that visibly reduces fine lines and wrinkles in just one week. Smooths and brightens skin.

name: Hydro Boost Water Gel
description: Oil-free water gel that instantly quenches dehydrated skin and maintains hydration throughout the day.

name: Oil-Free Acne Wash
description: Oil-free acne-fighting cleanser with 2% salicylic acid that clears breakouts and prevents new ones from forming.

name: Brightening Vitamin C Serum
description: Daily vitamin C serum that brightens dull skin, fades dark spots, and boosts collagen for a more youthful appearance.

name: The Dewy Skin Cream
description: Rich plumping cream that restores moisture and gives skin a dewy, glassy finish. Beloved for very dry or mature skin.

name: SuperGlow Vitamin C Serum
description: Brightening serum with 10.5% vitamin C and niacinamide that reduces dark spots and gives skin an immediate glow.

name: Ultra Facial Cream
description: 24-hour lightweight daily moisturizer that preserves skin's natural moisture balance. A classic for dry, sensitive skin.

name: Clearly Corrective Dark Spot Solution
description: Targets dark spots, post-acne marks, and uneven skin tone. Clinically shown to reduce dark spots in 4 weeks.

name: Salicylic Acid Cleanser
description: Leave-on BHA exfoliant that unclogs pores, reduces blackheads, and smooths bumpy skin texture. A cult classic.

name: 10% Azelaic Acid Booster
description: Multi-tasking treatment that calms redness, fades dark spots, and clears acne. Gentle enough for rosacea-prone skin.

name: Tea Tree Skin Clearing Facial Wash
description: Purifying cleanser with Community Fair Trade tea tree oil that deeply cleanses pores and controls excess oil.

name: Drops of Youth Concentrate
description: Youth-boosting serum that plumps, smooths, and firms skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and improving radiance.

name: Lactic Acid 10% + HA
description: Gentle AHA exfoliant that smooths skin texture and brightens without the irritation of stronger acids. Good for dry skin.

name: Eye Contour Cream
description: Targeted eye cream with retinol and caffeine to reduce dark circles, puffiness, and fine lines around the eye area.

name: Depuff Eye Cream
description: Rich eye cream that deeply moisturises the delicate under-eye area, reducing dryness, fine lines, and dark circles.

name: Peptide Eye Serum
description: Lightweight eye serum with peptides and caffeine that reduces puffiness, dark circles, and fine lines around the eyes.

name: Lip Sleeping Mask
description: Overnight lip mask that intensely hydrates and repairs dry, chapped lips while you sleep. Wakes up to soft, smooth lips.

name: Liplocked Peptide Lip Plumper
description: Peptide-infused lip treatment that plumps, smooths, and hydrates dry or chapped lips throughout the day.

name: Pore Minimizing Toner
description: Alcohol-free witch hazel toner that tightens pores, controls oil, and soothes skin without stripping its moisture barrier.

name: Glycolic Acid 7% Toning Solution
description: AHA toning solution that exfoliates the surface layer to reveal brighter, smoother skin. Use nightly for best results.

name: Soothing Toner
description: Gentle clarifying toner with natural BHA from willow bark that calms redness, reduces acne, and refines skin texture.

name: Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence
description: 96% snail mucin essence that repairs damaged skin, fades acne scars, and provides deep hydration for a plump, smooth complexion.
